name: Care Bears - Good Luck Bear
description: One lucky bear! Good Luck Bear is used to winning every game and having everything handed to him. He's just lucky that way. But now that he's in the Silver Lining, his luck has turned for the worse, and he has to rely on his determination and enthusiasm to get him through each difficult task that he faces. Luckily, Good Luck has his friends by his side to help him along the way. When he's not on a mission to help the Whiffles, Good Luck enjoys completing challenging puzzles, performing his rainbow juggling routine, and joking around with his best pal, Funshine.
creator: TicTonic
